summary: Medical imaging ML researcher at Telkom University, GPA 4.0/4.0. Built a bone scan diagnostic pipeline achieving patient-level AUC 0.956, above EXINI and BONENAVI (two commercial systems in clinical use). First-authored an IEEE Xplore conference paper on bird species identification. One ML model running in production on commercial mining fleet dashcams.

experience.role: Research Assistant, Multi-Task CXR Foundation Model
highlights: Developing a hierarchical pathology classifier covering 20+ disease categories with fallback uncertainty estimation for ambiguous cases, aligned to Indonesian healthcare organization standards.
Pathology classifier and organ segmentation module delivered as microservices consumed by the team's web and desktop apps.
Designed a fatigue detection model on real mining fleet dashcam footage. Achieved Macro F1 0.78, an 11% gain over the model in production.
Deployed a 3-service Docker stack with an async cloud-review API, risk escalation rules, and full test coverage against the live company server.
Fine-tuned BirdNET v2.4 on 12,511 recordings across 219 endemic and endangered species in Indonesia, Malaysia, and Borneo.
Macro F1 improved 44.1% over baseline. Published at ICITACEE 2025 (IEEE Xplore) as first author.
Screened 212+ papers using Zotero and Parsifal with AI-assisted triage, applying PRISMA-aligned quality assessment and structured data extraction.
Produced a synthesis mapping publication trends by year, covering the full reviewed corpus.
Annotated 600+ bone scan images supervised by nuclear medicine physicians at Dr. Hasan Sadikin Hospital, Universitas Padjadjaran.
Built hotspot detection and skeletal segmentation pipeline covering 12 anatomical regions. Patient-level AUC 0.956, surpassing EXINI and BONENAVI.
Recruited, taught, and evaluated 29 students across weekly sessions and a final project.
Supervised 15 project groups from proposal to final demonstration, evaluating technical and scientific quality at each stage.
Led the branch team at YESIST12 Maker Fair.
Identified and distributed competition opportunities across IEEE and BELMAWA programs.
Assigned as team lead on the plant disease classifier. Built the full pipeline: data cleaning, model training, and Streamlit deployment. Delivered in one semester.
Won 3rd place at CCI Summit Kaggle. Awarded 2nd Best Final Project in the Study Group.

experience.role: Assistant Lecturer, Programming and Algorithms II
highlights: Reviewed 200+ quiz questions with course lecturers, correcting errors before release.
Supported 40+ students with real-time debugging during live programming assessments.
Tutored 40+ students across weekly sessions. Graded four major assessments.
Built a multi-class sentiment detection model achieving 70% accuracy using Python, Scikit-learn, and pandas.
Developed proficiency in the standard data analysis stack: NumPy, pandas, seaborn, Scikit-learn.
Designed and delivered computational thinking activities for students at SMP Negeri 1 Pacet.
Created game-based exercises to teach problem-solving and algorithmic thinking.
Cleaned and prepared registration data for 1,000+ participants nationwide using Python scripts and Google Sheets.
Reviewed 4 conference papers and returned corrections ahead of deadline.
Managed AV setup for 4 sessions, assisted 22 presenters.

publications.title: Deep Learning-Based Segmentation of Whole-Body Bone Scan Images Using nnU-Netv2
publications.venue: International Journal of Intelligent Engineering and Systems (IJIES-INASS)

publications.title: Deep Learning for Bird Identification Using Sound: Enhancing Avian Monitoring and Conservation in Indonesia and Malaysia

publications.title: From Segmentation to Biomarker Quantification: A Deep Learning Framework for Metastases Detection in Bone Scans

publications.title: Whole-Body Bone Scintigraphy Segmentation Masks: Ground-Truth Annotations for Bone Area Segmentation

projects.title: Bone Metastasis Diagnosis Framework
highlights: Hotspot detection with YOLOv8: mAP@0.5 = 0.599. Skeletal segmentation with nnU-Net v2 across 12 anatomical regions: IoU 0.879.
Patient-level AUC 0.956 with XGBoost and LightGBM, surpassing EXINI (0.83–0.88) and BONENAVI (0.84–0.89), both in clinical use at the time.

projects.title: Deep Learning for Bird Sound Identification
highlights: Fine-tuned BirdNET v2.4 with MixIT source separation on 12,511 recordings across 219 endemic and endangered species in Indonesia, Malaysia, and Borneo.
Macro F1 improved 44.1% over baseline on the endemic subset. Field-validated at Bandung Zoo and Malaysia National Zoo under uncontrolled conditions.

projects.title: Driver Fatigue Detection
highlights: Macro F1 0.78 on real mining fleet dashcam footage, 11% above the company's existing production model.
Deployed a 3-service Docker stack serving a live async cloud-review API with risk escalation for nighttime hours and repeat fatigue events.

projects.title: Multimodal Deepfake Detection
highlights: One model detecting both video and audio manipulation without knowing the manipulation type at inference time.
Intra-dataset F1 0.94. Cross-dataset F1 0.60 after domain-adversarial training on 223,445 segments from PolyglotFake, FakeAVCeleb, HiDF, CelebDFv2, and FF++.

projects.title: Telplastina: Multi-Task CXR Analysis Platform
highlights: Led two of five AI modules within a clinical CXR platform: 20+ disease pathology classifier and organ segmentation.
Both modules deployed as microservices for the team's web app and desktop app through shared API endpoints.
